---
title: "Your project — overview"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
bibliography: ../references/references.bib
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
source(here::here("R", "01_setup.R"))
clean <- readRDS(processed_path("consumer_clean.rds"))
```

# What this report does

A one-paragraph description of what you're analysing and why.

This is a **starter template**. The full walkthrough lives in
[`00_walkthrough.qmd`](00_walkthrough.qmd). Use this file as a blank canvas
for your own report.

# Quick look at the data

```{r}
dplyr::glimpse(clean)
```

# A first plot

```{r}
#| fig-cap: "Purchase intention by condition."
plot_pi_by_condition(clean)
```

# Notes

Cite with `[@wickham2023]` like this: see @wickham2023 for the canonical
intro.

::: {#refs}
:::
